Why Book Direct?

Skip the fees.
Keep the perks.

When you book directly with Sea & City Rentals, you skip the Airbnb service fees, talk directly to us, and unlock exclusive perks you won't find anywhere else.

Book Direct Now
💰
Save up to 15%
No platform service fees added at checkout. What you see is what you pay.
💬
Direct Line to Us
Text or call us directly. No bots, no delays — real people who care.
🔁
Return Guest Perk
Come back and get 10% off your next stay — automatically.
✨
Custom Requests
Early check-in, special occasions, extended stays — just ask us.

About Us

Hosted with
heart

"We pour our hearts into every detail — because we know how important a perfect stay can be."

I've been hosting for over five years. While I'm a physician assistant by trade, I discovered a passion for hospitality and creating memorable guest experiences. Originally from Europe, I now split my time between New York and Florida — drawn to Florida's stunning beaches and sunshine.

My husband and I personally manage and care for all nine of our properties. As avid travelers ourselves, we know exactly what a seamless, stress-free stay means. Nothing brings us more joy than hearing how much our guests loved their time with us.

Meet Nella →
